overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a historic Southern town at golden hour. The character traverses muddy cobblestone streets, passes a horse-drawn carriage, and walks alongside a large Victorian mansion with wrought iron fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy historic street with stone walls

events.description: horse-drawn carriage crosses from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a muddy cobblestone street toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking ahead in the same direction
horse-drawn carriage with white horse crossing the street

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road reflecting the golden hour light
tall stone wall running along the left side of the street
ornate black iron fence with stone pillars surrounding the mansion
large two-story historic mansion with balconies and green shutters
classic black street lamp on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy cobblestone street flanked by a stone wall on the left and an iron fence on the right. A woman in blue walks ahead while a horse-drawn carriage crosses the road from right to left. The golden hour sun creates long shadows and warm backlighting.

events.description: character turns right at the intersection onto a new street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing down the cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress and hat walking on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: trees with pink blossoms lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the character walks along a cobblestone street with the Victorian mansion now on the left. Flowering trees line the right side of the street, and a woman in white walks along the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion perimeter path with iron fencing

events.description: character turns onto a narrow gravel path alongside the mansion perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path beside the mansion, passing pedestrians on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress standing near the mansion gate

entered.detail: narrow dirt and gravel path running alongside the mansion
tall stone wall reappearing on the left side of the path
trimmed evergreen hedges along the mansion perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a narrow gravel path running alongside the mansion, which now dominates the right side of the frame at close proximity. The path is enclosed by a stone wall on the left and the mansion's iron fence on the right. The character passes pedestrians while walking along the mansion's perimeter toward the distant waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic town at golden hour, transitioning from a wide cobblestone street to a narrow path alongside a grand estate. It begins with the character walking down a muddy road flanked by a stone wall and iron fencing, passing a woman in blue as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path under warm, backlit sunlight. As the character turns right at an intersection, the scene shifts to a street lined with flowering trees and a woman in white, with a large Victorian mansion now appearing on the left. The camera then follows the character onto a narrow gravel path where the mansion dominates the right side of the frame in close proximity. Finally, the movement continues along the mansion's perimeter, passing pedestrians between a stone wall and an iron fence while heading toward the distant waterfront.
